# Continuation Guides

- [`CONTINUATION_GUIDE_VERIFIED.md`](./CONTINUATION_GUIDE_VERIFIED.md) — step-by-step instructions aligned with the current runtime.
- [`CONTINUATION_GUIDE_FUTURE.md`](./CONTINUATION_GUIDE_FUTURE.md) — experiments and ergonomic ideas.

Pick the verified file when learning or updating code; use the future file to capture new patterns we want to prototype.
